title: Controlled authority
subtitle: Sound knowledgeable without overperforming.
overview: Authority comes from precision, fairness, and proportion.
Module: High C1 Writing Craft. C1 Hi turns advanced English into controlled independent performance through argument, interaction, source work, writing, professional output, and native-style ideas.

sections.title: C1 Hi focus
rows: Authority comes from precision, fairness, and proportion.
权威来自精确、公平和分寸。
At this level, writing improves when every sentence has a job and every paragraph has a reason to exist.
到了这个水平，写作提升来自每个句子都有功能，每段都有存在理由。
The more convincing claim is modest but firm: the system creates incentives that make certain outcomes more likely.
更有说服力的观点是克制但坚定的：这个系统创造了让某些结果更可能发生的激励。
Rewrite one sentence so it sounds authoritative but not inflated.
重写一个句子，让它有权威但不浮夸。

items.en: Authority comes from precision, fairness, and proportion.
items.zh: 权威来自精确、公平和分寸。

items.en: At this level, writing improves when every sentence has a job and every paragraph has a reason to exist.
items.zh: 到了这个水平，写作提升来自每个句子都有功能，每段都有存在理由。

items.en: The more convincing claim is modest but firm: the system creates incentives that make certain outcomes more likely.
items.zh: 更有说服力的观点是克制但坚定的：这个系统创造了让某些结果更可能发生的激励。

items.en: Native-style move: Authority comes from precision, fairness, and proportion.
items.zh: Native-style 动作：权威来自精确、公平和分寸。

items.en: At C1 Hi, I should be able to develop the idea without waiting for a perfect script.
items.zh: 到了 C1 Hi，我应该能在没有完美稿子的情况下展开想法。

items.en: I will make the argument precise, but I will keep the sentence readable and speakable.
items.zh: 我会让论证精确，但仍保持句子可读、可朗读。

items.en: The goal is controlled independence: I can choose, adjust, and defend my language in real time.
items.zh: 目标是有控制的独立：我能实时选择、调整并维护自己的语言。

items.en: If my answer sounds fluent but shallow, I will add structure, evidence, or a sharper distinction.
items.zh: 如果我的回答听起来流利但浅，我会加入结构、证据或更清楚的区别。

items.en: The more convincing claim is modest but firm: the system creates incentives that make certain outcomes more likely.
items.zh: 更有说服力的观点是克制但坚定的：这个系统创造了让某些结果更可能发生的激励。

items.en: Notice how the sentence carries judgment without sounding exaggerated.
items.zh: 注意这个句子如何表达判断，同时不显得夸张。

items.en: Shadow it once for rhythm, then reuse the pattern with a new topic.
items.zh: 先跟读一次练节奏，再用新话题复用这个模式。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Rewrite one sentence so it sounds authoritative but not inflated.
lines.zh: 重写一个句子，让它有权威但不浮夸。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The more convincing claim is modest but firm: the system creates incentives that make certain outcomes more likely.
lines.zh: 更有说服力的观点是克制但坚定的：这个系统创造了让某些结果更可能发生的激励。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you push that toward a stronger high-C1 answer?
lines.zh: 你能把它推进成更强的高 C1 回答吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a sharper distinction, a fair limitation, and a final sentence that shows judgment.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入更清楚的区别、一个公平的局限，以及一个体现判断力的结尾句。

items.en: Rewrite one sentence so it sounds authoritative but not inflated.
items.zh: 重写一个句子，让它有权威但不浮夸。

items.en: Speak once for three to five minutes, then mark the sentence where your reasoning becomes strongest.
items.zh: 说三到五分钟，然后标出推理最强的那个句子。

items.en: Rewrite that strong sentence into two versions: one more formal, one more conversational.
items.zh: 把那个强句改写成两个版本：一个更正式，一个更口语。

items.en: Add one native-style phrase from real input or from this lesson, and make it your own.
items.zh: 加入一个来自真实输入或本课的 native-style 短语，并把它变成你自己的表达。

items.en: Keep the final answer as evidence that you can perform at high C1, not just study high C1.
items.zh: 保留最终回答，作为你能实际表现高 C1，而不只是学习高 C1 的证据。
